declared_routes.purpose: Reproducible public validation and explainable demo scenarios.
GCAT/BCAT formalism probes and deterministic runner scenarios.
Adversarial, entity, and bounded sandbox testing without outside-sandbox authority.
Commit-time standing, stale-state replay, authority rebinding, and consequence-binding proof.
Boundary declaration, non-claim preservation, and manifest composability validation.

non_claims: No downstream route may consume an unbound dataset.
The GLM boundary case does not imply external adoption, endorsement, compatibility, conformance, delegated authority, shared execution authority, or authority inheritance.
